name: Feral Pounce
description:
Pounce on an enemy with primal fury, dealing 1742 Bleed Damage and applying the Hemorrhaging status effect.

Activating the ability again within the next 5 seconds causes you to rip into an enemy and deal 1302 Bleed Damage over 10 seconds, dealing up to 450% more damage to enemies under 100% Health.

Dealing damage with either attack restores 100 Stamina and extends your Werewolf Transformation by 1 second.
